    <h2 {...{
      "id": "wrap"
    }}>{`wrap`}</h2>
    <p>{`Wraps a SwiftUI view with the Brand Concierge overlay and optional floating button. Call this once at the app's root to enable the chat overlay across the entire view hierarchy.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`surfaces`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`title`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`subtitle`}</inlineCode>{`, and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`handleLink`}</inlineCode>{` parameters on `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`wrap(...)`}</inlineCode>{` only apply when chat is triggered via the built-in floating button. When chat is triggered via `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Concierge.show(...)`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Concierge.present(on:...)`}</inlineCode>{`, the values passed to those APIs are used instead.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "syntax"
    }}>{`Syntax`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`static func wrap<Content: View>(
    _ content: Content,
    surfaces: [String] = [],
    title: String? = nil,
    subtitle: String? = nil,
    hideButton: Bool = false,
    handleLink: ((URL) -> Bool)? = nil
) -> some View
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "parameters"
    }}>{`Parameters`}</h4>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`content`}</em>{` `}<strong parentName="li">{`required`}</strong>{` - The SwiftUI content to wrap.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`surfaces`}</em>{` - Surface identifiers sent to the Brand Concierge server. Defaults to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`[]`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`title`}</em>{` - Header title text shown at the top of the chat.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`subtitle`}</em>{` - Header subtitle text shown at the top of the chat.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`hideButton`}</em>{` - When `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`true`}</inlineCode>{`, hides the built-in floating button. Defaults to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`false`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`handleLink`}</em>{` - Optional callback for link routing. Return `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`true`}</inlineCode>{` to claim the URL; return `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`false`}</inlineCode>{` to let the SDK handle it.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "example"

        "className": "language-swift"

struct MyApp: App {
    var body: some Scene {
        WindowGroup {
            Concierge.wrap(
                ContentView(),
                surfaces: ["web://example.com/your-surface.html"]
            )
        }
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
